benefits.benefit_desc: Fo Ti improves blood circulation, meaning it helps to promote the flow of oxygen-rich blood throughout the body, which can help to improve overall cardiovascular health. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that give this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that give this benefit are the roots, which contain the highest concentration of these active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that give this benefit include decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules. The main health conditions that this benefit of Polygonum multiflorum helps relieve include high blood pressure, high cholesterol, and poor circulation.

Fo Ti reduces blood pressure, meaning it helps in lowering high blood pressure levels in the body, thereby promoting overall cardiovascular health. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins, such as gallic acid. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that give this benefit are the roots, which contain the highest concentration of bioactive compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that give this benefit include decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsule or tablet supplements. The main health conditions that this benefit of Polygonum multiflorum helps relieve include hypertension, atherosclerosis, and other cardiovascular diseases associated with high blood pressure.

Fo Ti enhances the immune system, meaning it helps to strengthen and regulate the body's defense system against harmful organisms and diseases. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and other phenolic acids. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that provide this benefit are the roots, which contain the highest concentration of bioactive compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that provide this benefit are decoctions, powdered extracts, and alcohol-based tinctures. The main health conditions that this benefit of Polygonum multiflorum helps relieve include weakened immune systems, frequent colds and flu, and chronic fatigue syndrome.

Fo Ti slows down the aging process, meaning it helps to delay or reduce the physiological and psychological effects of aging. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, anthraquinones, and flavonoids. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that provide this benefit are the roots and rhizomes. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that give this benefit include decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules. The main health conditions that this benefit of Polygonum multiflorum helps relieve include age-related cognitive decline, skin wrinkles and age spots, and loss of energy and vitality.

Fo Ti increases energy levels, meaning it can help to reduce feelings of fatigue and improve overall vitality. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that are believed to be responsible for this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that are used to achieve this benefit are the roots, which are rich in these active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that are used to increase energy levels include decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules. This benefit of Polygonum multiflorum is particularly helpful for individuals who are seeking a natural way to boost their energy levels and improve their overall sense of well-being. Additionally, it may be helpful for those experiencing fatigue related to chronic illness or stress. However, it is important to consult with a healthcare provider before starting any new supplement regimen.

Fo Ti promotes collagen production, meaning it helps in the synthesis of collagen, a protein that provides structure to the skin, hair, nails, tendons, and ligaments, and is essential for wound healing. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that have this benefit are the roots, which contain the highest concentration of the active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that provide this benefit are decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules. This benefit of Polygonum multiflorum is particularly helpful in relieving health conditions related to skin aging, such as wrinkles and sagging, as well as promoting overall skin, hair, and nail health.

Fo Ti improves liver function, meaning it helps to protect and promote the health of the liver by supporting its various functions, such as detoxification and metabolism. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins, such as gallic acid. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that have this benefit are the roots, which contain the highest concentration of these active compounds. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that provide this benefit are decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules made from the roots of the plant. This benefit of Polygonum multiflorum is particularly helpful for individuals with liver-related health conditions, such as hepatitis, fatty liver disease, and liver damage caused by toxins or medications.

Fo Ti regulates cholesterol levels, meaning it helps maintain a healthy balance of cholesterol in the body. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that provide this benefit are the roots and rhizomes. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that give this benefit include decoctions, powdered extracts, and capsules. This benefit of Polygonum multiflorum is particularly helpful in relieving hyperlipidemia, a condition characterized by an excess of fats or lipids in the blood, and in reducing the risk of cardiovascular diseases associated with high cholesterol levels.

Fo Ti reduces inflammation, meaning it may help decrease redness, swelling, and pain in the body caused by inflammatory conditions. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to its anti-inflammatory effects are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that possess anti-inflammatory properties are the roots and rhizomes. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that provide this benefit include powdered root, decoctions, and liquid extracts. The main health conditions that this benefit of Polygonum multiflorum helps relieve include chronic inflammatory diseases such as arthritis, dermatitis, and asthma.

Fo Ti protects against oxidative stress, meaning it helps to neutralize or prevent the damaging effects of free radicals in the body. The main active constituents of Polygonum multiflorum that contribute to this benefit are stilbenes, such as resveratrol, and tannins. The primary parts of the Polygonum multiflorum plant that have this benefit are the roots and rhizomes. The main medicinal preparations of Polygonum multiflorum that provide this benefit are decoctions, powdered extracts, and alcohol-based tinctures. This benefit of Polygonum multiflorum is particularly helpful in relieving health conditions associated with oxidative stress, such as aging, neurodegenerative diseases, and cardiovascular diseases.
